name: Rice with Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the crab meat, break it into chunks, and remove any cartilage. Shell and cook the shrimp if using them.
2. In a skillet, heat oil over medium-low heat. Add rice, onion, and garlic. Stir occasionally until the rice is golden brown.
3. Remove from heat. Add water, undrained tomatoes, bouillon granules, salt, and hot pepper sauce. Stir to combine.
4. Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
5. Stir in peas and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in crab meat (or cooked shrimp) and sherry. Heat through before serving.
